title: Ulcerative colitis follow-up
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports documenting current symptoms, previous response, adverse effects, patient preferences, and clinician review context.
assessment.rationale: The exact UC section supports interval bowel symptoms, bleeding, urgency, function, prior response, adverse effects, treatment context, and patient preferences without assigning severity or flare status.

source.title: Ulcerative colitis: management — Recommendations
source.jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE pathway adaptation
source.population: Adults, children, and young people with established ulcerative colitis.
source.setting: Primary and specialist care as qualified by the cited recommendations.
source.exclusions: Supports symptom, disease-course, treatment, monitoring, growth, bone-health, patient-view, and clinician-entered follow-up documentation without assigning severity or generating management.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.1–1.3 — information, treatment context, and review

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting current symptoms, previous response, adverse effects, patient preferences, and clinician review context.

assessment.text: Supports clinician-reviewed monitoring results, growth, bone-health context, and communication across services.
assessment.rationale: The exact monitoring section supports clinician-entered monitoring, growth or bone-health context where relevant, communication, and follow-up without generating medicine or surveillance.
